hero.title: Nasun
hero.subtitle: The Future of Entertainment
hero.description: Nasun is a community-driven, financially sustainable ecosystem, managing IPs for global mass consumption. Together we will not only produce powerful experiences in traditional mediums such as blockbuster films and AAA games but also pioneer the future of entertainment in both the digital and real worlds.

grants.title: AWARDS & GRANTS
grants.description: Nasun has won over 10 Awards and Grants through pitch competitions focused on gaming, content and business judged by relevant industry CEOs, leaders and experts selected and approved by the South Korean government.
grants.more: To learn more in detail about our process to applying, pitching and winning Grants,

newsEvents.title: NEWS & EVENTS
newsEvents.subtitle: LATEST UPDATES FROM NASUN
newsEvents.footer: Stay updated with the latest news, announcements, and events from the Nasun community.

joinUs.title: JOIN US AND GET INVOLVED
joinUs.description: Nasun will provide a place where people from all parts of the world and different backgrounds can come together to share their passion for art, storytelling, technology, and business, and in so doing, the community will become the main creative and financial driver of the studio. By leveraging the latest tech in Web3, AI, and social media, we will together, by managing IPs, grow a flourishing, complementary creative and financial environment to produce best in class products and services.

vision.title: VISION
vision.subtitle: On / Off-Chain Consensus
vision.description: Nasun community manages and scales intellectual properties (IPs) for global audiences. Our mission is to bring storytelling, finance, and technology together to reimagine how immersive experiences (from films and games to emerging digital and physical worlds) are brought to life and shared.

nasunIs.title: Nasun is
nasunIs.description: a Community-Driven Ecosystem that manages and scales intellectual properties (IPs) for global audiences. Our mission is to bring storytelling, finance, and technology together to reimagine how immersive experiences (from films and games to emerging digital and physical worlds) are brought to life and shared.

whatSetsUsApart.title: What sets us apart is
whatSetsUsApart.description: our focus on story. This is the soul of Nasun, and it will create a halo effect imparting everything in its glow with more value. Loyalty and devotion to a beloved source material form the most passionate communities.

joinUsAsWe.title: Join us as we
joinUsAsWe.description: unlock our collective potential and shape a future beyond imagination.

wave1.title: WAVE 1
wave1.intro: Nasun is opening its first cohort of contributors ahead of mainnet. There are two ways to participate:

leaderboard.title: For the Community – Leaderboard
leaderboard.line1: Contribute content, bring people in, and help create network effects.
leaderboard.line2: Climb the ranks to access the Launch Pool and earn Battalion NFTs.

battalionNft.title: For Founders – Battalion NFT
battalionNft.line1: Be recognized onchain as an early founder of Nasun.
battalionNft.line2: Get staking rewards, multipliers, and early access to the network.

earlyContributor.title: For Builders – Early Contributors
earlyContributor.line1: Developers and creators who want to build directly with the core team.
earlyContributor.line2: Receive Launch Pool allocation and secure a rare Battalion NFT.
